title: Monday Endurance Ride
objective: Use the energy and bike-freshness with a 60-minute steady endurance ride (1h window today) to restart frequency after a weekend of digging rather than riding.
why_now: The last few days were a gym, 3h of cottage digging/tree work, and a short Sunday ride - barely any bike. The legs are bike-fresh, so the re-entry starts with endurance volume, not a token spin. Kept seated and low-force so the back keeps recovering, with the harder work saved for Wednesday's sweet spot and Friday's long ride to Skov.

source_context.week_objective: Re-entry and aerobic rebuild after a disrupted, manual-labor weekend

targets.notes: 60 minutes steady endurance at 58-70% FTP (~150-182 W). Conversational, seated, smooth, low force - volume and frequency, not intensity. Only 1h available today, so no extension.

warmup.notes: Ramp naturally into endurance; check the back feels normal.

steps.notes: Steady aerobic endurance. Smooth cadence, low force on climbs, no surges.

nutrition.pre: Normal meal timing. If hungry, 20-30g carbs 30-60 min before.
nutrition.during: Water to thirst; small carb top-up optional.
nutrition.post: Normal meal with 25-35g protein and a carb serving.
nutrition.supplements: Today's workout needs: none required. Daily baseline only if already part of routine.

recovery.post_session: Refuel, hydrate, left-calf routine if tight.
recovery.next_morning_check: Tuesday endurance proceeds normally; note the back.

skill_focus.action: Hold one comfortable gear on rolling terrain for 2 x 10 min, letting cadence drift with the road.
skill_focus.why: Smooth low-force pressure rebuilds durability and unloads the back after the weekend digging.

mental_focus.why: Frequency and easy hours are what the energy should go into now; the hard efforts are Wednesday and Friday.
mental_focus.reset: If you start pressing, shift easier and settle below the cap for a minute.

pre_interval_cues: Seated, low force for the back.
execution_notes.if_too_easy: Good - keep it easy endurance. Hold the 60-minute cap today regardless.
execution_notes.if_too_hard: Cut to 60 minutes or stop if the back feels worse after 15 minutes.
execution_notes.success_criteria: Finished steady and loose, back no worse than before.
